title: Megalastrum pleiosoros
taxonomy: Megalastrum pleiosoros is a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae. It belongs to the genus Megalastrum, which is a group of ferns native to the Americas. The Lomariopsidaceae family is a group of ferns that are characterized by their moniliform (beaded) rhizomes and pinnate or bipinnate leaves. Megalastrum pleiosoros is a relatively understudied species, but it is known to be a climbing fern with long, slender stems and pinnate leaves. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and characteristics of this species.
